description: Internationalize the 'LibraryApp' Java project located at `~/eclipse-workspace/LibraryApp` by externalizing hardcoded strings. Externalize all user-facing strings, such as menu options, prompts, and success/error messages, from `src/main/java/com/library/app/LibraryApp.java` into a resource bundle. Use the bundle name `messages.properties` and accessor class `Messages.java` within the `com.library.app` package. Technical strings like switch case constants "1" and "2" should be marked as 'Never Externalize'. Ensure the project compiles without errors and all modified files are saved.
